moments.title: Love Island UK Final Week
moments.blurb: The 13th season of Love Island UK concludes on Monday, July 27th, after weeks of drama, romance, and coupling up in the villa.

angles.name: Final countdown
angles.copy: Who's taking home the £50k? It's the final week of Love Island UK! Tune in Monday for the big finale. #LoveIsland

angles.name: Villa drama
angles.copy: One last week of villa drama! Who's your favourite couple left in Love Island? The final is just days away!

angles.name: Recap & predictions
angles.copy: From bombshells to heartbreak, what a season! As Love Island UK heads for its finale on Monday, what's been your most iconic moment?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest UK Official Singles Chart sees Sam Fender & Olivia Dean at Number 1 with 'Rein Me In', while World Cup anthems 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' surge back into the top 3.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still holding strong at Number 1 with 'Rein Me In' on the Official Singles Chart! Who can knock them off?

angles.name: World Cup Chart Surge
angles.copy: World Cup fever is still gripping the charts! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' and Baddiel, Skinner & Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' are back in the Top 3. Incredible!

angles.name: New entries & climbers
angles.copy: Shakira & Burna Boy's World Cup anthem 'Dai Dai' is climbing, alongside ANOTR & 54 Ultra's 'Talk To You' making waves in the Top 5. Big tunes this week!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow, July 24th, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday J.Lo
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Tomorrow is Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday. What's your favourite J.Lo track to get the party started?

angles.name: Jenny from the Block
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to global icon, Jennifer Lopez turns 57 tomorrow! Still looking incredible and dropping bangers.

moments.title: Verdine White's Birthday
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the iconic bassist of Earth, Wind & Fire, turns 75 on July 25th, 2026.

angles.name: EWF Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire, who turns 75 on Saturday! What a legacy of funk and soul.

angles.name: Groove Master
angles.copy: The bassline legend, Verdine White, celebrates his 75th birthday this weekend! Still bringing the 'Boogie Wonderland' vibes.

moments.title: Mick Jagger's Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Icon Turns 83
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday! Still got the moves like Jagger. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Sunday! A true living legend of rock 'n' roll. What's his best song?

moments.title: Roger Taylor's Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic drummer, Roger Taylor, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th, 2026.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: Another rock legend celebrating this Sunday! Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor. What a beat!

angles.name: Radio Ga Ga Beat
angles.copy: From 'Radio Ga Ga' to 'Bohemian Rhapsody', Roger Taylor's drumming is unmistakable. He turns 77 this Sunday!

moments.title: Stormzy's Birthday
moments.blurb: Grime icon and chart-topper Stormzy celebrates his 33rd birthday on July 26th, 2026.

angles.name: Grime King
angles.copy: Big Mike turns 33 this Sunday! Happy Birthday to the one and only Stormzy. Drop your favourite track below!

angles.name: Birthday Boy
angles.copy: Celebrating Stormzy's 33rd birthday this weekend! From Glastonbury headliner to chart domination, what a career.

moments.title: Geddy Lee's Birthday
moments.blurb: Geddy Lee, the legendary bassist and vocalist of Canadian rock band Rush, turns 73 on July 29th, 2026.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to Rush's incredible Geddy Lee on Wednesday! A true bass-playing, high-pitched vocal legend.

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Geddy Lee from Rush, who turns 73 this week! What's your go-to Rush track?

moments.title: Martina McBride's Birthday
moments.blurb: Award-winning country music superstar Martina McBride celebrates her 60th birthday on July 29th, 2026.

angles.name: Country Queen
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the incredible Martina McBride on Wednesday! So many timeless country ballads.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: From 'Concrete Angel' to 'Independence Day', Martina McBride turns 60 this week! A voice that truly touches the soul.

moments.title: Kate Bush's Birthday
moments.blurb: The enigmatic and influential British singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on July 30th, 2026.

angles.name: Running Up That Hill
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the iconic Kate Bush this Thursday! Still influencing artists worldwide. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: British Icon
angles.copy: From 'Wuthering Heights' to modern-day legend, Kate Bush turns 68 on Thursday. A true pioneer of sound and style.

moments.title: Joe Elliott's Birthday
moments.blurb: Joe Elliott, the lead singer of legendary rock band Def Leppard, turns 67 on July 30th, 2026.

angles.name: Def Leppard Frontman
angles.copy: Pour some sugar on this! Happy 67th Birthday to Def Leppard's dynamic frontman, Joe Elliott, this Thursday!

angles.name: Rock Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating Joe Elliott of Def Leppard, who turns 67 this week! What's your favourite stadium anthem he's belted out?

moments.title: Buddy Guy's Birthday
moments.blurb: Blues guitar legend Buddy Guy celebrates his 90th birthday on July 30th, 2026.

angles.name: Blues King at 90
angles.copy: A monumental birthday this Thursday! The one and only blues titan, Buddy Guy, turns 90! What an incredible career.

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating 90 years of pure blues magic! Happy Birthday to the legendary Buddy Guy on July 30th.

moments.title: UEFA Super Cup Trophy Experience
moments.blurb: Aston Villa fans can get up close with the UEFA Champions League, Europa League, and Super Cup trophies during a special 'Trophy Experience' in Salzburg from July 29th to August 5th, ahead of their match against PSG on August 12th.

angles.name: Villa Trophy Tour
angles.copy: Calling all Aston Villa fans! Get ready to see the European trophies up close in Salzburg from July 29th, ahead of the Super Cup clash. #AVFC

angles.name: Super Cup Build-Up
angles.copy: The UEFA Super Cup build-up begins! Aston Villa are heading to Salzburg for a trophy experience before taking on PSG on August 12th. Exciting times!
